title: Giant pipe rises about 13 meters from road in central Osaka

paragraphs.english: A giant pipe has emerged about 13 meters above a road in a busy district of central Osaka, western Japan. The city is investigating the cause of the incident, and restoration work is underway.
paragraphs.pidgin: A giant pipe don emerged about 13 meters above a road for a busy district of central Osaka, western Japan. Di city dey investigate di cause of di incident, and restoration work na underway.

paragraphs.english: Osaka City officials said an iron pipe measuring 3.5 meters in diameter was discovered protruding from the road shortly before 7 a.m. on Wednesday. Thirteen meters of the 30-meter-long pipe had been pushed vertically out of the ground beneath the elevated Shin-Midosuji highway in the city's Kita Ward.
paragraphs.pidgin: Osaka City officials tok an iron pipe measuring 3.5 meters for diameter bin discovered protruding from di road shortly before 7 a.m. on Wednesday. Thirteen meters of di 30-meter-long pipe bin dey pushed vertically out of di ground beneath di elevated Shin-Midosuji highway for di city im Kita Ward.

paragraphs.english: Officials said the pipe was part of an underground conduit being prepared to store rainwater. On Tuesday, workers reportedly removed groundwater that had accumulated in the pipe.
paragraphs.pidgin: Officials tok di pipe bin part of an underground conduit being prepared to store rainwater. On Tuesday, workers reportedly removed groundwater dat bin $2 for di pipe.

paragraphs.english: The officials said they do not know whether this operation played a role in the pipe's emergence.
paragraphs.pidgin: Di officials tok dem no know whether dis operation played a role for di pipe im emergence.

paragraphs.english: They are investigating the cause of the incident. Workers are injecting water into the pipe to push it back underground.
paragraphs.pidgin: Dem dey investigate di cause of di incident. Workers dey injecte water into di pipe to push e back underground.

paragraphs.english: Officials say that there is a risk of the pipe rising further and reaching the elevated highway above. The Shin-Midosuji highway has therefore been closed since Wednesday morning. As a result, heavy traffic congestion has occurred around the busy Umeda district.
paragraphs.pidgin: Officials tok dat e dey a risk of di pipe rising further and reaching di elevated highway above. Di Shin-Midosuji highway get so dey close since Wednesday morning. so, heavy traffic congestion don occurred around di busy Umeda district.

paragraphs.english: City officials say they do not know when the road closure can be lifted.
paragraphs.pidgin: City officials tok dem no know when di road closure fit be lifted.

paragraphs.english: The head of the city's sewage department, Miyazaki Hiroaki, offered a deep apology for causing significant inconvenience to many residents.
paragraphs.pidgin: Di head of di city im sewage department, Miyazaki Hiroaki, offered a deep apology for causing big inconvenience to plenti residents.
